rationale: DIFFERENTIATOR VERDICT — GENUINE, NOT RIGGED. The zero-lexical-overlap corpus (charge_card/rotate_keys/evict_session/shard_ledger vs. doc titles Idempotent-retry-windows/Envelope-encryption/Sliding-window-TTL/Partition-rebalancing) shares no tokens between code symbol names and doc titles: a BM25/lexical ranker has zero signal to cross this gap. The gold docs live ONLY in the foreign scope SqliteStore; MemStore home contains only code nodes and four named lexical distractors (parse_args, open_socket, format_row, hash_blob) none of which appear in any doc title. cross_off=0.0 is structurally guaranteed: neighbors(code_id, Dependents) on a MemStore with no edges and no docs returns empty when cross_edge_kinds=[]. cross_on=1.0 comes solely from the four XEdge::about rows (doc_id->code_id, epoch=0) folded through cross_neighbors->xedge.in_edges filtered by rel=about, epoch-validated (MEMORY_EPOCH==0==row.source.epoch, home MemStore symbol_epoch==0==row.target.epoch). No lexical contamination path exists: find_symbols/all_nodes/all_edges are HOME-ONLY (DoD-X8 confirmed in code and by conformance tests). Lift=1.0>=0.5 is real. FALSIFIER recall_lift_vanishes_when_xedge_rows_absent: builds same engines but empty XedgeStore, cross_on_no_rows=0.0 — proves the lift is exclusively from xedge rows, not co-residence or any other signal. FALSIFIER stale_epoch_about_edge_is_dropped_fail_closed: stamps row with epoch=7 against MemStore that returns epoch=0 for live ids; epoch_valid() checks each Endpoint, finds live=0 != row.epoch=7, emits XEDGE-STALE-EPOCH log, returns false, row dropped, recall=0.0 — DEC-X6 fail-closed is real code, not a comment. 23-METHOD DELEGATION: all_nodes/all_edges/find_symbols delegate to self.home only (cross_on has no effect). neighbors FOLDs cross_neighbors union. traverse delegates to traverse_multi (single-seed slice). traverse_multi does home expansion then one cross ply bounded by max_cross_nodes. get_node ROUTEs home first then foreign pools. symbol_epoch ROUTEs home first then foreign pools. capabilities HOME-modified (server_side_traversal forced false when cross_on). overlay_implements_full_graphread_trait_object is a compile-time coercion to &dyn GraphRead — non-tautological: adding a 24th method without delegating it would break compilation. dod_x8_home_only_methods_never_leak_foreign_nodes: with two doc nodes in foreign pool and cross ARMED, all_nodes returns exactly 2 home code nodes and asserts no mem-synthetic string; all_edges empty; find_symbols returns no doc. DEVIATIONS SOUND: (1) ForeignEngine object-safe seam is architecturally necessary — AsyncGraphStore carries generic F+T on with_read/with_read_inline so dyn AsyncGraphStore is not object-safe; the blanket impl monomorphizes the generics inside concrete impl blocks exposing only non-generic blocking methods, achieving object-safety without trait duplication. The block_in_place+Handle::block_on pattern is correct on a spawn_blocking thread (tokio 1.x block_in_place on blocking thread is documented no-op wrapper). (2) OverlayReader<H: GraphRead+Sync> bound is load-bearing: GraphRead has Send supertrait; &H: Send iff H: Sync; dyn GraphRead is Send but !Sync; SqliteStore (rusqlite Connection) is !Sync — the carry-forward flag for T-X-OVL-WIRE (SqlitePool with_read hands a !Sync &dyn GraphRead, so SqliteStore home cannot be a borrowing overlay without an estate seam) is correctly identified and scoped. The MemStore home used in tests is Sync. clippy --all-targets -D warnings exits 0. cargo test shows 15 total (5 lib + 4 cross_engine_recall + 6 overlay_conformance), all passed.
